events.title: US Jobless Claims
events.impact: Labor market health indicator. High claims can signal economic cooling, potentially leading to dovish Fed shifts.
events.why_it_matters: Key weekly gauge of unemployment trend.

events.title: US Philly Fed Manufacturing Index
events.impact: Indicator of regional industrial health. Strong data suggests economic resilience.
events.why_it_matters: Leading indicator for national manufacturing trends.

events.title: CA Producer Price Inflation MoM
events.impact: Measures wholesale price changes. Rising PPI often precedes consumer inflation.
events.why_it_matters: Input for BoC interest rate decisions.
